subtitle: Doors opening — build the pipeline

planetInfluences.summary: Opens doors and widens the pipeline

tropicalReading.body: Today is Expansion — controlled opening under pressure. Use Uranus sextile Jupiter to widen one practical option, then let Moon trine Saturn decide the next disciplined move. For Capricorn Rising in a 12th-House annual profection, quiet preparation outranks public proof. Saturn is the quiet edit, not the loud cut. What matters: structural leverage and the 2nd-House North Node self-valuation arc. Ignore noise, old fairness disputes, and premature formalization.

traditionalReading.body:
Today is Expansion — refine the move, not announce it. Work the monthly profection through the 9th whole-sign house, Virgo: documents, counsel, study, publishing, legal or travel logistics. Its lord, Mercury, is the lord of the month, in Virgo by domicile and exaltation, and supported by Mercury sextile Mercury. Moon trine Saturn favors disciplined cleanup. Saturn is the quiet edit, not the loud cut. Watch out-of-sect Mars: do not force timing.

Moon today — Moon in Virgo, your 9th whole-sign house. Clean up the plan, verify the details, and ignore arguments that do not improve the next decision.

vedicReading.body:
Today is Expansion — useful openings under pressure. Build leverage for the move: send the message, clean the document, price the option, and leave signatures for later. In the Moon Mahadasha with Venus antardasha and Jupiter pratyantardasha, relationship and value channels help, but Venus with Ketu cuts dead weight. Mercury sextile Mercury favors precise outreach. Small Panoti makes Saturn the quiet edit, not the loud cut; prepare for the Aug 12-Sep 5 External Manifestation Window.

Moon today — Moon in Leo, your 9th house, nakshatra Purva Phalguni pada 4. Favor outreach, planning, and selective confidence; watch for comfort-seeking that turns into delay.

baziReading.body: Today is Yi-Chou Resource over quiet Ox — Resource feeds your Ding Fire; act by preparing, pruning, and choosing one visible move. The Jia-Wu solar-term month keeps Fire loud, while your Rabbit core needs clean direction, not extra noise. Favor learning, documents, outreach, and one concrete Output deliverable; ignore side contests. In the Wu-Zi Da Yun and 2026 Horse Ben Ming peer-fire field, move visibly but do not turn competition into compulsion or scatter into too many parallel fires: heat becomes burnout.

tarotCard.name: Four of Swords
tarotCard.body: Four of Swords — stability in clarity; consolidate and hold what you've built. Today is Expansion: build leverage and document the move, but keep formal commitments for later. Jupiter carries the field, and Saturn is the constraint to respect. Uranus sextile Jupiter is the sharpest aspect today — let it set the operating language. The Jupiter Return sits 22 days out, so treat today as part of that setup.

tropicalMonthly.body: Dominant influence: Capricorn Rising in a 12th-House annual profection keeps this a foundation/preparation month, not the final form; the Sun’s Cancer ingress on June 21 moves attention from output maintenance into agreements, counterparts, and pipeline quality. Use Gemini’s closing degree to clear operational noise, then build structural leverage through conversations, terms, and documented asks. July 12’s Jupiter return supports expansion through positioned relationships, but only what is already organized; this is a valuation cycle you work, not a predetermined one. Pluto on your 2nd-House North Node keeps the self-valuation arc non-negotiable: price, scope, ownership, and contribution have to match. July 16 makes competence and old sensitivity overlap in public/career contexts, so respond with evidence, not defensiveness. This month is scaffolding under load: build leverage now, formalize after late August.

traditionalMonthly.body: The dominant month is 9th whole-sign Virgo: Mercury is lord of the month, and because your natal Mercury is in Virgo, in domicile and exaltation, this is a well-placed time-lord. Use the next stretch for study, publishing, systems, legal/admin clarity, and long-range planning; the loud issue is not speed, it is whether the plan is precise enough to carry weight later. As lord of the year, Jupiter governs the 12th-house Sagittarius year, and in a day chart Jupiter is the in-sect benefic, so quiet preparation has more value than public forcing. Mercury gets support by sextile, while Mars trines Mercury; Mars-Venus is friction looking for a build, not a fight. Watch haste, argument, and overextension, especially because Mars is the out-of-sect malefic. Around 2026-06-30, the month hands off to the 10th whole-sign house Libra, ruled by Venus: begin formalizing reputation-facing work, but do not overpackage what is still being assembled.

vedicMonthly.body: Moon–Venus–Jupiter is the dominant Vimshottari sub-period chain: build relationship, cash-flow, pipeline, and support structures now; formal weight comes later. For Sagittarius Lagna, Sade Sati (Small Panoti) keeps pressure high through 2027-06-02, so do not confuse opening with completion. June 20 starts with the transit Moon in Purva Phalguni: use the next lunar cycle for outreach, repair, sorting agreements, and pruning weak obligations. June 28-30 is the practical checkpoint inside the current External Manifestation Window; separate real leverage from noise. Saturn is the quiet edit, not the loud cut. What matters is preparation for Aug 12 – Sep 5 2026, the strongest external window; what does not matter is forcing certainty before the structure can carry it.

baziMonthly.body: The dominant stack is the 戊子 Wu-Zi Da Yun under 2026 Bing-Wu Ben Ming: peer Fire is visible, competitive, and expensive if unmanaged. June 20’s Yi-Chou field favors Resource feeding Output: build the pipeline, document the offer, tighten delivery capacity. The current Jia-Wu month, opened by Mang Zhong, gives Ding Fire Resource plus Horse Fire support; move visibly, but do not turn competition into compulsion or scatter into too many parallel fires. On July 7, Xiao Shu shifts the month to Yi-Wei: Resource becomes more practical, Earth Output asks for packaging, proof, and usable structure. July 7-September 7 is the weight-bearing visibility corridor, with July 12 inside the strongest expansion stack. Treat this month as dry kindling: useful for ignition, risky if every spark becomes a project.

tacticalSlots.note: Year branch repeats in 2026 — drive and visibility run hot
Natal month AND hour branch — structural pressure is real
Your true core branch — finesse, curation, clean expression over force
Mnemonic overlay only — not a natal pillar (literal hour branch is Monkey)

consensus.primaryAction: Prepare quietly and refine the move before committing.

todaysInsight: Build leverage under pressure. Expand the pipeline, tighten your numbers, and delay final commitments.

opportunity: Jupiter is lord of the year (benefic regime)
approaching benefic window: Jupiter return — chapter reset (22d)
pressure: Sade Sati (Small Panoti) — pressure on foundations
momentum: BaZi Da Yun shift within 87 days
